best_bet.reason: A strong south-to-north longshore current and 1 to 3-foot waves make tomorrow ideal for swimmers and body surfers who want a little more action than flat-water conditions, plus the moderate longshore will keep you moving along the beach without fighting the water.

counties.name: New Hanover County
counties.beaches: Wrightsville Beach · Carolina Beach · Kure Beach
